name: io.github.shahidla/cds-db-nlquery-mcp
description: MCP server for natural-language queries against SAP CAP db-layer entities via real CQN/SQL JOINs.

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (used if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and OPENAI_API_KEY is not)
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated entity allowlist, enforced on JOINs too
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_ENTITIES

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated column blocklist, stripped before the query is built
environmentVariables.name: MCP_BLOCKED_COLUMNS
